CustomField.description: Enter the number of days in 'Fee Due Day' to push the fee due date from the invoice or fee start date
CustomField.inlineHelpText: If selected, you must enter a value in the "Fee Due Day" field. Fixed Day in a Week: If selected, provide values for both the "Day" and "Weekday Number" fields. Relative: If selected, enter the number of days in the "Fee Due Day" field. This will push the fee due date by the specified number of days from the Invoice Date/fee start date.
CustomField.label: Fee Due Type

value.fullName: Relative Based On fee period Start Date
value.label: Relative Based On fee period Start Date
